untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 30th percentile of 20-day rolling spread distribution — no spread/bid-ask indicator available in allowed list; (2) limit order execution probability estimate inferred from bid-ask movement — no bid-ask or order flow indicator available; (3) news/event detection within 60-minute window — no economic calendar or news indicator available. Used bb_bandwidth as imperfect proxy for spread narrowness and vol_ratio_20 as proxy for execution probability, but these are not direct translations of the original conditions.
translation_notes: Signal is microstructure-dependent and requires tick-level bid-ask data and news event detection that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The direction is context-dependent (favors sellers in this specific scenario but logic applies to buyers in opposite scenarios). Entry uses bb_bandwidth < 0.30 as proxy for abnormally narrow spreads and vol_ratio_20 < 0.40 as weak proxy for low execution probability. Exit triggers when bandwidth normalizes above 0.50th percentile equivalent. Hold duration set to 1 day as this is a high-frequency microstructure signal. Stop loss is tight at 1.5% due to risk of adverse microstructure move.
